query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO image_source_domains (domain, status, category, license_type, notes) VALUES
('pbs.twimg.com', 'whitelisted', 'social', 'fair_use_news', 'Twitter/X image CDN'),
('scontent.cdninstagram.com', 'whitelisted', 'social', 'fair_use_news', 'Instagram image CDN'),
('lookaside.fbsbx.com', 'whitelisted', 'social', 'fair_use_news', 'Facebook image CDN'),
('external.fna.fbcdn.net', 'whitelisted', 'social', 'fair_use_news', 'Facebook image CDN'),
('upload.wikimedia.org', 'whitelisted', 'free', 'cc_various', 'Wikimedia Commons'),
('live.staticflickr.com', 'whitelisted', 'free', 'cc_various', 'Flickr CC images'),
('images.unsplash.com', 'whitelisted', 'free', 'unsplash_license', 'Unsplash free images'),
('images.pexels.com', 'whitelisted', 'free', 'pexels_license', 'Pexels free images'),
('pixabay.com', 'whitelisted', 'free', 'pixabay_license', 'Pixabay free images'),
('s.yimg.com', 'whitelisted', 'news', 'fair_use_editorial', 'Yahoo News images'),
('static01.nyt.com', 'whitelisted', 'news', 'fair_use_editorial', 'NYT images - editorial use'),
('ichef.bbci.co.uk', 'whitelisted', 'news', 'fair_use_editorial', 'BBC images - editorial use'),
('media.gettyimages.com', 'blacklisted', 'paid_stock', NULL, 'Will send DMCA takedowns'),
('thumbs.dreamstime.com', 'blacklisted', 'paid_stock', NULL, 'Watermarked previews'),
('image.shutterstock.com', 'blacklisted', 'paid_stock', NULL, 'Will send DMCA takedowns'),
('stock.adobe.com', 'blacklisted', 'paid_stock', NULL, 'Will send DMCA takedowns'),
('media.istockphoto.com', 'blacklisted', 'paid_stock', NULL, 'Will send DMCA takedowns'),
('c8.alamy.com', 'blacklisted', 'paid_stock', NULL, 'Will send DMCA takedowns'),
('www.alamy.com', 'blacklisted', 'paid_stock', NULL, 'Will send DMCA takedowns');
